programme.desc: As Lupin's mentor Don Dolune lies on his deathbed, he hands the master thief a gift: the diamond named Twilight. But it's only half of the treasure-the other half of the Twilight can be found in Morocco…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Notorious gangster, Al Capone left behind five tiles that reveal the location of his massive gold hoard when put together. Out of the five tiles, Lupin and Fujiko have three in their possession.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata concocts an extravagant plan to finally capture Lupin by luring him in with a fake meteor made from 6 tons of pure gold. Low and behold, his plan backfires and Lupin and his gang make off with the meteor.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin sneaks into an old castle to steal a collection of priceless angel paintings, owned by the late Malcolm Hurst. Inside the castle, Lupin meets a mysterious girl named Flora, who knows the whereabouts of the angel paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are out at sea attempting to retrieve the gold inside a sunken pirate ship. However, a female pirate gang interrupts their retrieval mission and both parties leave empty-handed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in South Africa to receive a nautical chart from a retired Nazi that shows the location of a sunken Nazi treasure. However, two young German soldiers interrupt the exchange and a skirmish ensues.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in the small city of San Pico in Central America. However, the city was in the midst of a war between the Government Forces and the Guerilla Army. Leading the Guerilla Army is Jigen's old army pal, Giranco.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Fujiko had once betrayed her heist partner Garb, known as the Grim Reaper, and left him for dead. Garb, who has seemingly returned from the dead, is determined to kill Fujiko and has an uncanny ability to dodge bullets with ease.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious cult that idolizes a solid gold Virgin Mary statue abducts Fujiko and they're planning to burn her at the stake as a witch. However, her kidnapper and the cult leader look vaguely familiar to Lupin. Have they crossed paths before?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has a horrible case of athlete's foot and visits Dr. Budweiser, who is also a cloning expert, for treatment. The doctor takes a sample of Lupin's skin under the guise of treating his Athlete's foot, but the doctor has another plan up his sleeve.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Lauren's hard work at LA Fashion Week leads to a career opportunity of a lifetime, she is torn between her job and her boyfriend. Whitney says goodbye to LA for the summer, and Heidi and Audrina look forward to being single in the city.

programme.title: The Hills: The Hills
programme.desc: After a rocky summer with her boyfriend Jason, Lauren decides to break it off and returns to Teen Vogue to face her unhappy boss. Heidi finds herself in trouble with a guy both she and Audrina are dating.

programme.title: The Hills: When You Least Expect It
programme.desc: Lauren goes on her first date since Jason and is tested at work when she's asked to work a fashion show. Heidi has a life-changing secret she must tell her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills: The Best Night Ever
programme.desc: When an uninvited Audrina shows up at Heidi's birthday, she learns Heidi's not ready to forgive and forget. Lauren, determined to focus on work, falls for the charms of the new guy in her life, Brody.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break from Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Aquí se arma la de cantina
programme.desc: Leslie e Isaac se hacen novios. Una discusión provoca que Lizbeth le moje las pestañas a Ali y se desate la guerra. El nuevo ex se lleva la sorpresa de encontrarse con dos ex-amores. Rufas tiene las llaves de la Love Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Los demonios bailan en la villa
programme.desc: Rufas le rompe el corazón a Carolina. A Jey le toca escena de celos doble. La sala tornado sopla todos los chismes de Brandon. El lobo está enjaulado mientras que Yess le hace piojitos. Una fiesta empieza bien y termina con la llegada de un ex.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Efectos instantáneos
programme.desc: Yess se dio tragos hasta encontrar el más amargo. Los bandos tratan de encontrar la paz, pero solo tratan. Isaac ya no puede forzar la máquina y termina a Leslie. Unas pócimas mágicas llenas de alcohol hacen efecto inmediato en los influencers.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: ¡Que viva la toxicidad!
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Ali dan los votos a su amor tóxico, mientras que los salvados dan sus votos a la soltería. La Love Suite se abre por última vez con un trío muy caliente.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: 10 influencers llegan a sus vacaciones en el caribe, pero la "Tablet del Karma" les recuerda que deben saldar cuentas con sus Ex. Asaf elige a Lilian para su corazon.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las advertencias de Valentino se convierten en amenazas. A Alex le regalan un shot, pero en la cara. Llega un nuevo Ex y los celos llenan a la villa de problemas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Valentino celebra el peor cumpleaños por culpa de la Sala Tornado. Desenmascaran a Queen quien saca su furia. Un Ex cae en una venganza tramada. Dos estrenan la Love Suite. Diana y Fershy arruinan la fiesta peleando y alguien debe partir de la villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Fershy decide quien se va, entre Beni y Alba. La Sala Tornado cocina una venganza que los hará tambalear a todos. Lilian explora con Alba y Bryan mientras que Asaf aprovecha con Valeria. En la nueva habitacion hay sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: El nuevo Ex sorprende entrando por la puerta trasera. Asaf arrastra su corazon por culpa de la indiferencia de Lilian, quien prueba los labios de Bryan y Alba. Ana va a la Love Suite y Aldo aprovecha para destrozar las camas. Un Ex llega acompañado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro put their strength to the ultimate test in a battle with a dragon. Meanwhile, a band of mysterious intruders make their gassy presence felt aboard the Sunny!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy gets up close and personal with a torso-less Samurai! Elsewhere, Nami, Sanji, Chopper, and Franky find themselves imprisoned with the pieces of a human face!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes friends with a Centaur, Franky uses a cola-powered laser to break out of the clink, and Sanji takes a chance on a body-less Samurai!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami's soft spot for children prompts her to call off the escape and declare war on anyone who makes a kid cry. Meanwhile, Luffy and the gang take a banana boat to the icy side of the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's group finds themselves up against a gang of centaurs, Brook battles the torso of a surly samurai, and Captain Smoker encounters someone highly unexpected!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and Chopper seek a safe exit for the children, Luffy's group hopes to avoid a perilous plunge into icy waters, and Captain Smoker faces off against Trafalgar Law!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's group takes a deadly plunge into icy waters, and Trafalgar Law uses his unique abilities to rearrange Nami's group and cast our heroes into chaotic confusion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy and his mates race toward a reunion, Admiral Smoker struggles to survive a heart-stopping showdown with Trafalgar Law!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is excited to once again cross paths with Trafalgar Law, but a reunion with his mixed up crew – and the loss of his extra legs – quickly dampens the captain's enthusiasm!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Captain Smoker determines his next move, a very large pirate with alligator legs tells Luffy and the Straw Hats the true story of Punk Hazard's mysterious transformation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Toriko, Luffy, and Goku's three-way tie in the World's Best Eating Competition, the festivities are interrupted by the sudden appearance of a monster that threatens to consume every living thing on earth.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The giant children fly into a mysterious rage, and Chopper discovers the true reason for their unusual condition! Meanwhile, Zoro, Brook, and Sanji cross paths with a dangerous duo!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy agrees to an alliance with Trafalgar Law, but the Straw Hats refuse to leave the island until the children are safe. Meanwhile, the gaseous master unleashes something very deadly!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Brook continue their search for the samurai, Trafalgar tries to sneak Chopper into the laboratory, and Luffy boldly challenges the Master!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's battle with his old nemesis Smoker is interrupted by the arrival of a terrifying toxic blob – and the evil genius who created the monster!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats make a valiant push to capture Caesar Clown - Luffy matches his Armament Haki with Clown's powerful Gas-Gas Fruit powers! The battle turns in favor of the Straw Hats, but underestimating Clown's abilities may have deadly consequences!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trafalgar Law finds trouble in the form of an old acquaintance, Chopper investigates the Master's lab, and the mysterious Samurai shows what he can do with a full body!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Master gathers his young test subjects, shocking secret identities are finally revealed, and the poisonous purple blob continues its march across the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and Usopp get an unexpected helping hand in their fight to save the children, Chopper plots a daring escape attempt, and the Master markets his greatest weapon!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats find themselves pursued by a deadly cloud of purple gas that turns everything living thing in its path into petrified statues of ash!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Caesar hatches a plan to forever silence his enemies, Chopper races through the compound in search of the drugged children, and Tashigi's men make the ultimate sacrifice!

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Journalist Maggie Freleng searches for answers in the 2004 disappearance of a nursing student following a car crash in New Hampshire.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Maggie investigates reasons why Maura Murray secretly drove to New Hampshire and never came home, including a possible pregnancy or an emotional phone call with her sister.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: There are questions about happened to Maura after she crashed on a rural road in New Hampshire: did she run into the woods, hop into a car with someone she knew and escape to a new life in Canada, or worse, hitch a ride with a dangerous stranger.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: New Hampshire's law enforcement community keeps their findings of Maura's case close to the chest; Maggie explores the theories related to a police conspiracy, hoping to break down a decade-long code of silence.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Killers and kidnappers are Maggie's focus as she works to find out if Maura Murray was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: The DNA results are revealed; Maggie seeks the advice of a psychic; a wild lead is pursued at the top of a mountain; Maggie sits down with Maura's family and reveals evidence released by law enforcement for the first time in 13 years.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: Natalee Holloway disappears from Aruba in May 2005, and her father Dave never stops looking for her; he receives a new lead that could be the key to solving the 12-year-old mystery, but he has suspicions about the source.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: Dave Holloway and a team of investigators pursue a lead that may shed light on his daughter's disappearance, with the goal of obtaining a taped confession and concrete evidence.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: The sting operation in New Orleans continues as the investigation team begins running out of time to obtain the necessary information from the co-conspirator.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ and his team head to Aruba to begin phase two of their investigation - attempting to obtain DNA evidence from Natalee's alleged burial site; Dave must convince his informant to go the extra mile.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ races to the location where the co-conspirator claims he dug up Natalee's remains in 2010; working with the Aruban authorities, they search for DNA that could lead to convicting those involved in Natalee's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: After two years following a lead, the investigators finally have evidence in hand that could answer the 12-year-old mystery of what happened to Natalee Holloway.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Phoenix Coldon vanishes; investigative reporter, Shawndrea Thomas, and retired deputy Police Chief Joe Delia attempt to unravel the mysterious unsolved case in the hope of finding justice for Phoenix.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Joe and Shawndrea follow up on a handful of Phoenix sightings since her disappearance and begin to question whether she'd been lured into a new life more dangerous than she could have anticipated; a surprising lead goes to an unexpected locale.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys visit a Kentucky property with a racetrack that revives an old Mike & Frank rivalry. Later, a freestyle stop in North Carolina looks like a bust until they unearth a one-of-a-kind TV relic.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are freestyling in Minnesota where they stumble on salvage operator Terry who has a staggering scrap yard. Everything is for sale, including a mother lode of retro signage.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Driving along the back roads of Tennessee in the early morning fog, Mike and Frank are brushing up on their Southern expressions when they spot an awesome property.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Old Man has an opportunity to buy lost footage of legendary President Franklin Delano Roosevelt.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Get revved up with the Pawn Stars as they check out a rare REO Flying Cloud hot rod from the 1930s. Will Rick muster the strength to crank up an offer for this classic ride or will the deal take a detour and sputter out?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Corey has a chance to buy a wooden crossbow that hasn't been fired in almost 40 years--will it hold together and hit its mark or splinter, crack and fracture the deal? Meanwhile Rick blushes when a woman tries to sell her husband's Playboy collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: A former Georgia boxer fights to keep a lifetime of stockpiled stuff but his wife is fed up.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II

programme.title: Wolfblood

programme.title: Wolfblood

programme.title: Wolfblood

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: When Gwen's father is imprisoned for treason and killed, Morgana decides she must take revenge.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: How far is the Merlin prepared to go to protect his destiny and what will he have to sacrifice?

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Merlin is convinced a slippery newcomer is up to something.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: When it comes to the birth of the universe, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the Big Bang.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one of Earth's closest neighbors, but until very recent exploratory missions, it eluded astronomers' best efforts to learn its secrets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: why have alien civilizations not presented themselves?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: An advanced $900 million planetary explorer designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal intricate details undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: The night sky has always been a source of wonder and mystery. In the quest to explore the universe, our greatest ally is the Hubble telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Painted By Light
programme.desc: When the universe formed, all of space blazed white-hot, but it didn't last. Darkness reined for 200 million years before the light was reborn.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Colour
programme.desc: Color is essential to both art and astronomy. When measured, it can tell us the temperature, chemical composition, and motion of astronomical objects.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Perspective
programme.desc: For most of human history, the night sky seemed two-dimensional. To our ancestors, this perspective gave no hint to the universe's true depth.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: How gold is mined and transformed into everyday objects like jewelry and currency.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Humans refine and evolve weapons designs over the millennia to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: Black Gold

programme.title: Black Gold

programme.title: Black Gold

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: While Rick conducts a test that may help the team locate man-made flood tunnels on the island, Marty heads to Europe to track down an incredible lead.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: On a planet doomed to destruction, Kirk, Spock, and McCoy become involved with two aliens who use them as laboratory animals in a bizarre series of tests on an alien empath who may be the savior of her planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock deliver medicine to an insane asylum where a former Starfleet captain is being held. They discover that he has freed the inmates and is running the place.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise hosts two alien beings from the same planet who share an intense and self-destructive hatred of each other.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, McCoy, and Sulu are stranded on a barren planet where a mysterious woman attempts to kill them one at a time, while the Enterprise must travel halfway across the galaxy to rescue them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must deal with incorporeal cloud-like aliens who have already destroyed the inhabitants of a library planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.desc: The Enterprise picks up a group of space "hippies" looking for Eden.

programme.desc: The issue of capital punishment divides the crew when Voyager agrees to transport condemned prisoners to their deaths.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager is sucked into an inescapable subspace void which is inhabited only by other trapped vessels battling each other for survival.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an exploratory walk on a jungle planet, Sheppard touches a glowing crystalline growth and becomes host to an infectious energy form. Once on Atlantis, the entity begins to move from person to person, putting the entire crew at risk.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: On his way back to Atlantis, Lt. Col. Sheppard is taken prisoner by a rogue ship helmed by a ruthless human commander with a secret agenda. As the team searches for him, Sheppard's resourcefulness is put to the test as he tries to stay alive.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With Atlantis plagued by an amnesia-causing virus, McKay wakes up with no idea who he is or what is going on. Following instructions from a video he recorded earlier, McKay frees himself and sets out to find the key to unlocking this mystery.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Arriving on New Athos for an overnight visit, Teyla and Dr. Keller discover the entire settlement abandoned and their own lives in jeopardy from the Bola Kai, a fierce warrior tribe. The pair must avoid capture until Atlantis sends a search party.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With still no trace of the Athosians, Teyla requests an off-world visit to meet with a seer, Davos, who may be able to help her find her people. Meanwhile on Atlantis, Agent Woolsey arrives to observe and review Col. Carter.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the Destiny still out of power, a plan is born to abandon the ship using the last working shuttle, in hopes that another planet will be habitable. But hope is short-lived when the only way to determine who will go and who will stay is a lottery.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Despite severe rationing and around-the-clock security, the water reserves onboard the Destiny continue to drop. Dr. Nicholas Rush has no explanation for this latest setback but, if they are to survive, they must find a new water source soon.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the situation onboard the Destiny dire, General O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and Homeworld Command order Col. Young to execute a high-risk plan concocted by the IOA scientists which, in theory, could return the crew to Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After making a surprising discovery on a jungle planet, members of the team become ill. In an attempt to isolate the infection, the team sets up camp in the jungle. But when night falls, the illness will be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is selected to test the effects of alien-tech wristbands on human wearers, and soon find themselves blessed with spectacular strength and speed. But when they are sent on a mission utilizing these new abilities, they learn a shocking lesson.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a High Priestess from the planet Chulak claims to have a plan that would cripple the Goa'uld, everyone is skeptical. SG-1 must join forces with the Tok'ra in order to put her plan into effect, but a deadly, hidden secret could jeopardize it.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When an SGC soldier under the influence of a Goa'uld mind-control device attempts to assassinate a High Council member, SG-1 must uncover other potential assassins, even amongst themselves, before the president arrives for a crucial Summit meeting!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After a visit to a strange planet in the middle of a geomagnetic storm they find themselves repeating the same day over and over again. The team must utilize their accumulated knowledge to stop the time loop before there are disastrous consequences.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labor revolt against the warden; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules fleeing Oceanside; Eugene stands trial with Yumiko as his defense attorney.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital; Rosita, Eugene and Gabriel search for Coco; Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela; as the citizens of the Commonwealth deal with the herd, the heroes assemble for one last stand to save their future.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl Dixon's arrival to France sets off a violent chain of events that inadvertently puts a young boy at the heart of a growing religious movement in danger; Daryl agrees to help shepherd the boy to safety in exchange for help returning to America.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl, Isabelle, Laurent and Sylvie face trouble on the road; Isabelle remembers the day the hungry ones appeared; Laurent struggles to fit in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: The group arrives in Paris, where Isabelle confronts her past while growing closer to Daryl; Codron seeks help from the leader of a growing nationalist movement called Pouvoir, putting the Union of Hope and Laurent under dangerous scrutiny.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl and Isabelle must negotiate with Quinn, the proprietor of the underground Demimonde club, the last vestige of art and expression in Paris.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl faces old demons, recalling the circumstances that landed him in France; Isabelle's sacrifice forces her to consider drastic measures; Genet commences a celebration for the people of Paris.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Genet ensures to strengthen her base of power; Daryl has a job to do before he can go back to America.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Carol maps a path toward Daryl that forces her to confront her past; Daryl, Isabelle, and Laurent struggle to define their roles at the Nest, under the watchful supervision of Losang; Daryl and Nesters launch a rescue mission for Fallou and Emile.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Carol and Ash take an unexpected detour during their journey to find Daryl; Daryl, Isabelle, and Sylvie uncover a dark new threat at the Nest. Losang's faith is tested.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Carol's hunt for information leads her to dangerous places and a new set of horrors; Daryl, Isabelle, and Fallou race to save one of their own; Pouvoir regroups.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras busca a Sophia, Daryl sufre un accidente que lo deja perdido y herido en el bosque. La tensión entre el grupo y los propietarios de la granja aumenta, así como la inestabilidad del propio grupo, debido a que Shane desafía a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras descubrir que la familia mantiene encerrada a sus familiares convertidos en zombis en el granero, Dale confronta a Hershel. Lori, por su parte, confiesa a Rick que está embarazada y los problemas entre los integrantes del grupo se intensifican.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn le revela a todo el grupo el secreto del granero, pero no están de acuerdo sobre cómo actuar: Rick ordena respetar la autoridad de Hershel, aunque Shane quiere acabar con los zombis. Por otra parte, descubren por fin qué le ha pasado a Sophia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hershel no soporta lo ocurrido y recae en su alcoholismo, pero Rick y Glenn lo siguen hasta la ciudad para evitar que muera. Entretanto, Beth, incapaz de aceptar todo lo que le está sucediendo a su familia, entra en estado catatónico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Lori sale en busca de Rick, pero lo único que encuentra es un peligro mortal y Shane va tras ella. Entretanto, Rick, Hershel y Glenn mantienen un tiroteo con los desconocidos con quienes cruzaron sus caminos en el bar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La tensión entre Rick y Shane aumenta y la decisión sobre el destino de Randall es el detonante: Shane quiere matarlo, Rick prefiere dejarlo vivo. Mientras, Beth pretende suicidarse y Andrea, quien debe vigilarla, no cumple con su cometido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre que Randall es un violador y asesino y acuerdan ejecutarlo, pero Dale se opone porque eso los convertiría también en criminales. Mientras tanto, Carl comete un error que acarreará consecuencias imprevistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las diferencias entre Rick y Shane por el liderato del grupo y la gestión de la granja se intensifican cuando Shane decide por su cuenta el destino de Randall. La tensión termina estallando y los dos amigos se enfrentan a muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una horda de zombis invade la granja y el grupo intenta escapar vivo entre el caos, pero no todos lo lograrán. Además, Rick se harta de las quejas del grupo y les da un ultimátum: si quieren que sea el líder, acatarán sus órdenes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra refugio en las instalaciones de una prisión federal abandonada tras meses en la carretera. Rick considera que se trata de un lugar seguro para que Lori pase los últimos meses de embarazo, pero quizá se haya equivocado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick accede a dejar salir de sus celdas a los prisioneros si les ayudan a matar a los zombis que quedan en la prisión. Entretanto, la salud de Hershel empeora por momentos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Woodbury, Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y planea irse sin Andrea. En la prisión, un sabotaje provoca que una horda de zombis penetre en la cárcel y, mientras Rick y sus compañeros los combaten, Lori entra en trabajo de parto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick está totalmente abatido por la muerte de Lori, pero recibe una llamada telefónica sorprendente. Entretanto, Michonne ha descubierto el secreto del Gobernador y se dispone a abandonar Woodbury, a pesar de que Andrea quiere permanecer allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne ve a Glenn y Maggie buscando provisiones, pero alguien más los observa: Merle, quien reconoce a Glenn como uno de los que le abandonó, a merced de los zombis, en una azotea de Atlanta. Entretanto, Rick sigue mentalmente inestable.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne conduce a Rick, Daryl y Oscar a Woodbury para rescatar a Glenn y Maggie, a quienes el Gobernador está torturando para sonsacarles dónde se oculta el grupo de Rick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Furley helps Jack lose his "I can stay away for a week" bet with the girls.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Terri believe that Janet is trying to seduce Furley's shy nephew.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Instead of catching sleep in the dingy apartment above his restaurant, Jack catches Mr. Angelino with a young woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Rob Brant
programme.desc: On June 26th 2021 Janibek Alimkhanuly battled Rob Brant for WBC Continental Americas middleweight title at the Virgin Hotels in Las Vegas with Brant going down in round 6 Alimkhanuly secured the victory in the eighth round.

programme.title: Jared Anderson vs Kingsley Ibeh
programme.desc: On February 13th, 2021 Jared Anderson dominated Kingsley Ibeh during "The Bubble" at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a six round bout Anderson secured the victory by knockout.

programme.title: Joe Smith Jr vs Eleider Alvarez
programme.desc: On August 22nd, 2020 Joe Smith Jr. and Eleider Alvarez fought each other in "The Bubble" at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went the full 12 rounds Smith Jr. was able to secure the victory.

programme.title: Joe Smith Jr vs Maxim Vlasov
programme.desc: On April 10th, 2021, Joe Smith Jr fought Maxim Vlasov for the WBO World Light Heavyweight Title at Osage Casino in Tulsa. In a great battle, Joe Smith Jr barely pulled off a very close majority decision victory.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Antonio Orozco
programme.desc: On September 14th, 2018 Jose Ramirez faced Antonio Orozco for the WBC World Super Lightweight title at the Save Mart Arena in Fresno, Ca. with Orozco suffering legal eye cuts in round 4 and 6 Ramirez was able to secure the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Jose Zepeda
programme.desc: On February 10th, 2019 Jose Ramirez battles Jose Zepeda for the WBC World Super Lightweight title at the Save Mart Arena in Fresno, Ca. with the 12 round bout ending in a majority decision win for Ramirez.

programme.title: Jose Zepeda vs Ivan Baranchyk
programme.desc: On October 3rd, 2020 Jose Zepeda faced Ivan Baranchyk in a battle for WBC silver super light weight title at the Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas with both opponents going down it ended in a victory for Zepeda.

programme.title: Josh Taylor vs Jose Ramirez
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 2021, Josh Taylor fought Jose Ramirez for the undisputed super lightweight title in Las Vegas. With a lot of bad blood going into the fight, Josh Taylor prevailed, winning by a close unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Juan Manuel Marquez vs Mike Alvarado
programme.desc: On May 17th, 2014, Juan Manuel Marquez fought Mike Alvarado in a WBO Welterweight Title eliminator at The Forum in Inglewood. Both fighters scored a knockdown in the bout, but it was Marquez that prevailed with a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ivan Robinson
programme.desc: On May 28th, 2005 Julio Cesar Chavez and Ivan Robinson faced eachother at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in an unamimous decision victory for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ken Sigurani
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1998 Julio Cesar Chavez faced Ken Sigurani at the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket resulting in a technical knock out win for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Scott Walker
programme.desc: On February 9th, 1996 Julio Cesar Chavez and Scott Walker faced each other in a 10 round bout at the Cesars Palace Sports Pavilion in Las Vegas that ended in the second round by technical knockout for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Kelly Pavlik vs Jermain Taylor 2
programme.desc: On February 16th, 2008 Kelly Pavlik faced Jermain Taylor for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas the 12 round bout resulted in a unanimous decision win for Pavlik.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Esteban Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 30th, 2022, Keyshawn Davis fought Esteban Sanchez in a lightweight bout at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Delivering a sixth round TKO, Davis showed his speed and agility and that he'll have a promising future in the lightweight division.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Jose Zaragoza
programme.desc: On December 11th, 2021, Keyshawn Davis and Jose Zaragoza fought at Madison Square Garden in New York resulting in Zaragoza going down twice in round two giving the victory to Keyshawn Davis.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Omar Tienda Bahena
programme.desc: On September 23rd, 2022 Keyshawn Davis fought Omar Tienda Bahena at the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ with Bahena going down in round 5 that solidfied Davis' win by technical knockout.

programme.title: Manny Pacquaio vs Timothy Bradley II
programme.desc: On April 12th, 2014 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO World Welterweight title in a 12 round bout resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.
